Delivering excellence in healthcare since 2007, Shifa Al Bawadi Medical Service Co. stands as a trusted name in multi-specialty medical services.

Exceptional medical care across our specialized facilities, providing advanced treatments with a patient-first approach.

Almas Ideal Medical Center, established in 2015, aims to deliver high-quality medical care to both individuals and corporate clients. We pride ourselves on creating a healing environment that combines medical expertise with the comfort of our patients.

Almas Ideal Medical Center, located on Seteen Road, Jeddah, offers high-quality medical services for individuals and corporate clients through medical teams and advanced technologies. Our center is equipped to handle specialized care with precision and excellence.
We partner with leading insurance providers to ensure accessible medical care for everyone.

Also known as the "Hollywood Peel", this superior laser treatment combines a specialized carbon lotion to gently remove tired superficial skin layers, instantly revealing smoother, younger, and deeply radiant skin.
Quick 20-minute sessions with absolutely zero downtime
Gentle dead skin removal for instant radiance and glow
Unifies uneven skin tones and manages acne
Hair bleaching and fine hair removal
Collagen stimulation for mild skin tightening
An advanced laser technology specifically designed for permanent hair reduction. It features a proprietary Dynamic Cooling Device (DCD™) to protect skin and ensure maximum comfort.
Highly effective for all skin types (I-VI).
15 mins for small areas; under 90 mins for full body.
Permanent reduction of unwanted thick and fine hair
Professional hair removal for all body areas
Effective treatment regardless of skin pigmentation

A highly dynamic fractional CO2 laser designed for intensive skin resurfacing. It offers remarkable results, often after a single treatment, with minimal downtime to restore your skin's youthful texture.
A full face treatment typically takes 15–20 minutes.
Slight warm sensation with minimal discomfort (uses topical anesthetic).
Rapid recovery with exceptionally minimal downtime.
Delivers significant improvements often after just one session.
Drastically fades acne, burn, and surgical scars.
Tightens skin laxity, fading deep wrinkles (face/neck/jaw).
Minimizes large pores and stretch marks.

An advanced, multi-functional medical-grade system offering comprehensive skin rejuvenation. It thoroughly cleanses, extracts impurities, and deeply hydrates using vital serums to deliver a flawless, deeply nourished complexion instantly.
Gently removes dead skin, blackheads, and detoxifies.
Nourishes dry skin while controlling excess oil and sebum.
Reduces fine lines, early signs of aging, and boosts overall elasticity.
Completely safe for all skin types with absolutely zero downtime.
Routine acne reduction and breakout prevention
Advanced hydration therapy for dull and distressed skin
Complexion brightening and significant pore minimization
Preventative and restorative anti-aging facial procedures

Specialized clinical equipment structurally designed to deeply purify and revitalize your scalp. By gently exfoliating buildup and unclogging hair follicles, it creates the optimal environment for robust hair growth and vitality.
Removes dirt and strictly controls greasy scalp sebum.
Gently exfoliates to powerfully eliminate dandruff and soothe irritation.
Drastically clears blocked follicles to promote thicker hair growth.
Massages and hydrates scalp to improve vital blood circulation.
Premium preparation to enhance absorption for PRP and mesotherapy
Routine management and reversal of excessively oily or flaky scalps
Targeted therapy preventing hair fall directly caused by clogged pores
Comprehensive and safe maintenance for all scalp types with zero downtime

// In case there are newly added lucide icons lucide.createIcons(); // Department filtering logic document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn'); const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.practitioner-card'); filterBtns.forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { // Update active button state filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); const filterValue = btn.getAttribute('data-filter'); // Filter cards based on department title inner text cards.forEach(card => { const deptTitle = card.querySelector('.dept-title').textContent.trim().toUpperCase(); // We use display: "" to revert back to its natural CSS display when shown. if (filterValue === 'ALL') { card.style.display = ''; } else if (deptTitle.includes(filterValue)) { // Prevent "DEPARTMENT" from triggering the "ENT" filter if (filterValue === 'ENT' && !deptTitle.includes('ENT DEPARTMENT')) { card.style.display = 'none'; } else { card.style.display = ''; } } else { card.style.display = 'none'; } }); }); }); });

.category-selector { margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: center; } .category-sel { padding: 10px; margin: 5px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--primary); background: transparent; color: var(--primary); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; } .category-sel.active { background: var(--primary); color: white; } .subcategory-container { display: none; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px; padding: 15px; background: var(--bg-light); border-radius: 10px; } .subcategory-container.active { display: block; } .subcat-btn { padding: 8px 15px; margin: 5px; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid var(--secondary); background: transparent; color: var(--secondary); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; } .subcat-btn.active { background: var(--secondary); color: white; } .offers-grid { display: none; } .offers-grid.active { display: grid; } .offer-card { display: none; } .custom-select-wrapper { position: relative; width: 100%; margin: 10px 0; user-select: none; text-align: left; } .custom-select { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 5px; background: white; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-main); font-size: 0.95rem; } .custom-select:after { content: "▼"; font-size: 0.7em; color: var(--text-muted); } .custom-options { position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; background: white; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-top: none; border-radius: 0 0 5px 5px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); z-index: 10; display: none; max-height: 180px; overflow-y: auto; } .custom-select-wrapper.open .custom-options { display: block; } .custom-select-wrapper.open .custom-select { border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0; } .custom-option { padding: 8px 12px; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; font-size: 0.95rem; } .custom-option:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .custom-option:hover { background: var(--bg-light); } .custom-option.selected { background: var(--primary-light); font-weight: 600; }

// Advanced Packages filtering logic document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { const categories = document.querySelectorAll('.category-sel'); const subcategories = document.querySelectorAll('.subcat-btn'); const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.package-card'); const offersGrid = document.getElementById('offers-container'); const subLaser = document.getElementById('sub-laser'); function updateView(activeCat, activeSub) { // hide all first cards.forEach(c => c.style.display = 'none'); offersGrid.classList.add('active'); // ensure grid is shown // Show subcategory filters if laser is active if(activeCat === 'laser') { subLaser.classList.add('active'); } else { subLaser.classList.remove('active'); } cards.forEach(card => { const cCat = card.getAttribute('data-cat'); const cSub = card.getAttribute('data-sub'); if (activeCat === 'all') { card.style.display = 'flex'; } else if (cCat === activeCat) { if (cCat === 'laser') { if (cSub === activeSub) { card.style.display = 'flex'; } } else { card.style.display = 'flex'; } } }); } categories.forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { categories.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); const cat = btn.getAttribute('data-cat'); let sub = ''; if (cat === 'laser') { // default sub for laser const actSubBtn = document.querySelector('.subcat-btn.active'); if(actSubBtn) sub = actSubBtn.getAttribute('data-sub'); } updateView(cat, sub); }); }); subcategories.forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { subcategories.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); const cat = document.querySelector('.category-sel.active').getAttribute('data-cat'); const sub = btn.getAttribute('data-sub'); updateView(cat, sub); }); }); // Start with All Offers active updateView('all', ''); // Custom Select dropdown logic document.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-wrapper').forEach(wrapper => { const select = wrapper.querySelector('.custom-select'); const options = wrapper.querySelectorAll('.custom-option'); select.addEventListener('click', () => { document.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-wrapper').forEach(w => { if(w !== wrapper) w.classList.remove('open'); }); wrapper.classList.toggle('open'); }); options.forEach(opt => { opt.addEventListener('click', () => { select.innerHTML = opt.innerHTML; options.forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected')); opt.classList.add('selected'); wrapper.classList.remove('open'); }); }); }); document.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if(!e.target.closest('.custom-select-wrapper')) { document.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-wrapper').forEach(w => w.classList.remove('open')); } }); });
